name: Delicious Decimals
description: Add as many decimals as your hunger desires!

delicious-dial.name: Delicious Dial (DD)
delicious-dial.description:
Choose how your Delicious Decimals behave.

Definitive: The 'classic' mode. It directly uses your Delicious Decimal (DD) input.

Dynamix: Keeps your % in a constant place. This is noticable with a larger Delicious Decimal (DD).
RISK: With larger values, this will lag the game.

Deviation: Sequentially adds more Delicious Decimals to your screen based on Delicious Deviation Degree (DDD)

delicious-decimals.name: Delicious Decimals (DD)
delicious-decimals.description:
The amount of Delicious Decimals (DD) you want to display.

Note: This value will be limited to match your screen size when you open a level.

delicious-deviation-degree.name: Delicious Deviation Degree (DDD)
delicious-deviation-degree.description:
The rate of which the Delicious Decimals (DD) increase

Ensure you enable the Distribution in Delicious Dial (DD) setting to use this feature.
